title: Create Template
subtitle: Create a new template from scratch or based on an existing template.

source.title: Template Source
source.description: Choose how you want to create this template.

scratch.title: Create from Scratch
scratch.description: Start with a blank template and define everything yourself.

example.title: Use Example Template
example.description: Start with a pre-configured example template.

import.title: Import from Git
import.description: Import a template from a Git repository.

clone.title: Clone Existing Template
clone.description: Create a copy of an existing template.

name.label: Template Name
name.description: A unique name for this template

display.label: Display Name
display.description: A friendly name shown in the UI

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Choose an icon for this template

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Add tags to help users find this template

organization.label: Organization
organization.description: Select which organization this template belongs to

defaultTTL.label: Default TTL
defaultTTL.description: Default time-to-live for workspaces created from this template

autoStart.label: Allow users to auto-start workspaces
autoStart.description: Users can configure workspaces to start on a schedule

requireActiveVersion.label: Require active version
requireActiveVersion.description: Workspaces must use an active template version

canAlwaysEdit.label: Allow users to always edit
canAlwaysEdit.description: Users can edit workspaces even after they've started

resources.title: Template Resources
resources.description: Define the infrastructure resources for this template.

permissions.title: Template Permissions
permissions.description: Control who can use and manage this template.

variables.title: Template Variables
variables.description: Define variables that users can configure when creating workspaces.

documentation.title: Template Documentation
documentation.description: Add documentation to help users understand and use this template.

exampleUsage.title: Example Usage
exampleUsage.description: Show users how to use this template

validation.nameInvalid: Template name must be 1-64 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
validation.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to Git repository
validation.noResources: Template must have at least one resource

help.title: Template Creation Guide
help.description: Learn how to create effective templates for your team.
